title: Movement Tweaks
description: Highly Customizable Solutions to Minecraft's Movement Problem™ (Mainly Elytra)
body:
Adds a lot of customizable tweaks to Minecraft's Movement(mainly elytra)

This datapack does *not* change anything by default and you will have to tinker with the Config.

You can access the Config with: 
# `/function movement_tweaks:admin/config`
# Config
## Elytra Tweaks
|Elytra Settings|Description|Default|
|-|-|-|
|Disable Elytra|Completely Disables the Elytra|Off|
|Disable Elytra in Water|Disables Elytra in Water. Negated if player has Conduit Power|Off|
|Disable Elytra in Rain|Disables Elytra in Rain. Negated if player has Conduit Power|Off|
|Stacking Wetness|Elytra needs to dry off for up to 5 seconds after leaving water/rain if their respective settings are on|Off|
|Disable Elytra by Water Splash|Elytra gets disabled by Splash Water Bottles for up to 3 seconds depending on how close it landed|Off|
|Required Air Time|Amount of Ticks player needs to be in the Air to use Elytra|Off|
|Stacking Air Time|Air time decreases instead of resetting when the Player touches the ground so Players can jump multiple times to do a "takeoff" instead of jumping off a cliff every time|Off|
|Damage Elytra with Firework|Elytra takes durability damage when the Player uses fireworks|Off|
|Disable Elytra in Lava|Disables Elytra while in Lava|Off|
|Elytra Brakes|Glide can be cancelled by pressing Shift while *not* pressing any movement keys|Off|

## Mount Tweaks
applies to Horses, Donkeys, Mules, Skeleton Horses and Zombie Horses
|Mount Settings|Description|Default|
|-|-|-|
|Mounts Swim|Mounts float on water (in Vanilla since 1.21.11)|Off|
|Mounts get in Boats|Mounts get in boats when dismounted on one. Mounts' scales also get slightly reduced while in a boat for ease of use|Off|
|Mount Speed on Path|Grants Speed II to Mounts on Path Blocks|Off|

## Player Movement Tweaks
|Player Settings|Description|Default|
|-|-|-|
|Player Speed on Path|Grants Speed II on Path Blocks|Off|

You can use [No Command Confirm](https://modrinth.com/mod/nocc) to not deal with the annoying confirmation screen

Contact me on Discord for any issues! @hexasan
